evals.prompt: I have a new branding client — it's a sustainable skincare brand for Indian women aged 25-40. They filled out the questionnaire. Help me build the brand strategy.
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this is a filled-questionnaire scenario and proceed to generate the full brand strategy report. Should produce all 12 sections: brand origin, vision, mission, values, goals, target audience with personas, brand personality, brand voice, competitor analysis, positioning, differentiation, and tagline suggestions. Should write in a confident, editorial voice — not generic or AI-sounding. Should include India-specific context in audience and competitor sections. Should offer 3-5 tagline options.
assertions: Writes in confident editorial voice, not AI-sounding
Includes audience personas with real-feeling detail
Includes competitor analysis with named competitors
Uses brand-specific language throughout, not generic filler
Positioning section includes both narrative and statement

evals.prompt: I have a new branding client and need to start collecting information. Can you help me?
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this as a fresh-start scenario and present the full brand questionnaire. Should present all 5 sections of the questionnaire in clean, formatted structure: The Basics, Audience & Market, Brand Values & Personality, Brand Personality Sliders, and Goals. Should wait for the user to fill it out before generating the report.
assertions: Instructs user to fill out before proceeding

evals.expected_output: Should trigger on the casual phrase 'create a brand report'. Should ask whether the user has a filled questionnaire or wants to start fresh. Should not jump to generating a report without information.
assertions: Asks for clarification on mode (questionnaire vs. existing brief)
Does not generate a report without information
